core_skills: Data management operations, Data governance, Data protection, Privacy regulations, Software engineering management
skill_match_scores: Data management operations:1.0, Data governance:1.0, Data protection:1.0, Privacy regulations:1.0, Software engineering management:1.0
must_have_quals: Strong understanding of data management operations, Familiarity with data governance principles, Knowledge of data protection best practices, Awareness of privacy regulations that govern data usage and exposure, Demonstrated experience leading and developing technical teams, Comfortable managing and mentoring engineering talent, Conducting performance assessments and supporting ongoing growth and development, Excellent communication skills, Ability to translate complex technical concepts clearly for both technical teams and business leadership, Collaborates effectively across teams and organizations
core_responsibilities: Lead and manage a team of software engineers, including internal developers and external SOW contractors, responsible for building, deploying, operating, and enhancing the CDIP platform, Oversee development and delivery activities to ensure platform enhancements and releases are executed efficiently, reliably, and in alignment with business objectives, Partner closely with architecture and technical leadership to ensure development teams clearly understand system requirements, technical standards, and design expectations, Coordinate across internal and external stakeholders to ensure all development activities comply with Mastercard policies, security requirements, and engineering standards, Proactively identify, escalate, and resolve risks, issues, and blockers, ensuring leadership has clear visibility and teams remain aligned toward delivery goals
job_summary: Mastercard is a global technology company in the payments industry. The role involves leading a team of software engineers to manage the CDIP platform's deployment, operation, and enhancement while ensuring compliance with organizational standards and data governance requirements.
